overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a yellow jacket exploring an abandoned snowy military bunker. The character moves from the bright exterior through dark industrial corridors and offices filled with frozen corpses and icicles, eventually climbing to an upper level to examine artifacts.

snow-covered peaks visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an abandoned military bunker in a snowy mountainous region. The exterior features concrete fortifications with an anti-aircraft gun emplacement, while snow blankets the ground and structures under an overcast sky.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the exterior metal stairs toward the bunker entrance. Moving from the open snow into a sheltered doorway, the lighting shifts dramatically from bright natural light to deep shadow as the character enters the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned facility entry room with snow drifts

segments.scene_description: Inside the bunker, snow has drifted across the floors of dimly lit industrial rooms. The character discovers a frozen corpse against the wall before entering a larger office space where icicles hang from the ceiling and multiple bodies lie frozen at their desks.

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow dark corridor away from the main office, approaching a metal ladder. After climbing through a ceiling hatch, the character emerges on an upper level with visible yellow industrial pipes.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen command office with display cases

character examines military uniform in glass display case

framed portraits and artwork on walls

segments.scene_description: The upper level reveals a wood-paneled office preserved in ice, with frozen corpses still seated at desks. The character approaches a glass display case containing a military uniform and examines it closely, while icicles hang from the ceiling and vintage furniture remains scattered throughout the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, snowy mountain exterior into the oppressive, frozen depths of an abandoned military bunker. It begins by approaching concrete fortifications and an anti-aircraft gun emplacement under a heavy overcast sky. As the character ascends exterior metal stairs, the camera moves from the open snow into a sheltered doorway, where the lighting shifts dramatically from bright natural light to deep shadow. The scene then expands into dimly lit industrial rooms with snow drifting across the floors, passing a frozen corpse against the wall before entering a larger office space. Finally, the camera reveals a grim interior where icicles hang from the ceiling and multiple bodies lie frozen at their desks.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a frozen, preserved upper-level office. It begins as the character navigates a narrow dark hallway, moving toward a metal ladder and climbing through a ceiling hatch. As the character emerges onto the upper level, the environment shifts to an industrial space defined by prominent yellow pipes before opening into a wood-paneled office. The scene then expands to reveal a room encased in ice, where frozen corpses remain seated at desks beneath hanging icicles. Finally, the camera closes in on a glass display case containing a military uniform, surrounded by scattered vintage furniture.
